430 def build_secret_manifest(
431     name: str,
432     data: Mapping[str, Optional[str]],
433     secret_type: str = "Opaque",
434 ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
435     """Builds a Kubernetes secret manifest.
436 
437     Args:
438         name: Name of the secret.
439         data: The secret data.
440         secret_type: The secret type.
441 
442     Returns:
443         The secret manifest.
444     """
445     encoded_data = {
446         key: base64.b64encode(value.encode()).decode() if value else None
447         for key, value in data.items()
448     }
449 
450     return {
451         "apiVersion": "v1",
452         "kind": "Secret",
453         "metadata": {
454             "name": name,
455         },
456         "type": secret_type,
457         "data": encoded_data,
458     }
